/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/ui.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,uix86_64.so -o uix86_64.so CMakeFiles/ui.dir/src/game/bg_misc.c.o CMakeFiles/ui.dir/src/game/q_math.c.o CMakeFiles/ui.dir/src/game/q_shared.c.o CMakeFiles/ui.dir/src/ui/ui_atoms.c.o CMakeFiles/ui.dir/src/ui/ui_gameinfo.c.o CMakeFiles/ui.dir/src/ui/ui_main.c.o CMakeFiles/ui.dir/src/ui/ui_players.c.o CMakeFiles/ui.dir/src/ui/ui_shared.c.o CMakeFiles/ui.dir/src/ui/ui_syscalls.c.o CMakeFiles/ui.dir/src/ui/ui_util.c.o
